use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Creating call-to-action buttons in landing pages
Building navigation elements with action handlers
Implementing user interactions in dashboard interfaces
Adding accessible button controls to component libraries
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI's Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Includes accessibility features like focus rings and disabled states.
